criteria.reason: Generated scene_description formulas now use IF(raw="","",raw), so blank raw cells render as blank strings instead of Excel 0.
Rows with transcript text still reference 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C* through the blank-safe formula.
Short and extended synthetic workbooks prove the formula rewrite applies to the generated data-row range.
The implementation is scoped to 2_FRAME_MARKUP scene-description formulas and does not touch scoring or transcript generation.
Syntax, helper, integration, and diff hygiene checks passed.

commands_run: Unit formula rewrite check via python stdin
Synthetic short workbook generation with blank/populated transcript segments via python stdin
Synthetic extended workbook generation with 21 rows via python stdin
